scientific_task: Collect quantitative performance data for optical sensors based on photonic materials, including photonic crystals, plasmonic/photonic hybrid structures, photonic crystal fibers, MOF-based photonic crystals, and related nanophotonic sensing platforms.

record_definition.one_record: One reported quantitative sensor-performance measurement for a specific photonic material or device architecture, analyte or sensing target, and source under stated experimental or simulation conditions.
